rulings.Case Title: DOMENIC J CANNIZZARO et al VS. FRED P RICHARD et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Ssettlement Agreement Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 664.6
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for, Tuesday, March 24, line 1. INTERVENOR Robert Richard II's motion to enforce settlement agreement is GRANTED. Opposition filed on March 20, 2015 was stricken and untimely. Rob II is awarded $5,080 in attorney's fees and costs as prevailing party.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. JENNIFER IHEMAGUBA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for, Tuesday, March 24, line 5. DEFENDANT JENNIFER IHEMAGUBA's MOTION TO SET ASIDE AND VACATE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT is GRANTED, subject to Opposition. Defendant's omission of an answer appears to be due to Defendant's inadvertence, surprise, or excusable neglect. (CCP § 473(b).)= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EDWARD MURPHY VS. ROBERT A SHELDON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-15-651530 WITH CASE CUD-15-651064
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for, Tuesday, March 24, line 7. PLAINTIFF EDWARD MURPHY's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE CUD-15-651530 WITH CASE CUD-15-651064 is GRANTED. CUD-15-651064 and CUD-15-651530 involve common issues of law and fact because both cases involve the same plaintiff, same defendant, and same rental unit at issue. = (501/REQ)
